DEFINE command  -- Command given to units describing what they should do.
DEFINE command::attack  -- Attack another entity.
DEFINE command::attack_area  -- Go to a place and attack what you see.
DEFINE command::build_base  -- Go to a position and build a base there.
DEFINE command::compound  -- Chain commands together, see [defines.compound_command](runtime:defines.compound_command).
DEFINE command::flee  -- Flee from another entity.
DEFINE command::go_to_location  -- Go to a specific position.
DEFINE command::group  -- Do what your group wants you to do.
DEFINE command::stop  -- Stop moving and stay where you are.
DEFINE command::wander  -- Chill.
DEFINE compound_command  -- How commands are joined together in a compound command (see [defines.command.compound](runtime:defines.command.compou...
DEFINE compound_command::logical_and  -- Fail on first failure. Only succeeds if all commands (executed one after another) succeed.
DEFINE compound_command::logical_or  -- Succeed on first success. Only fails if all commands (executed one after another) fail.
DEFINE compound_command::return_last  -- Execute all commands in sequence and fail or succeed depending on the return status of the last command.

DEFINE controllers 
DEFINE controllers::character  -- The controller controls a character. This is the default controller in freeplay.
DEFINE controllers::cutscene  -- The player can't interact with the world, and the camera pans around in a predefined manner.
DEFINE controllers::editor  -- The Editor Controller near ultimate power to do almost anything in the game.
DEFINE controllers::ghost  -- Can't interact with the world, can only observe. Used in the multiplayer waiting-to-respawn screen.
DEFINE controllers::god  -- The controller isn't tied to a character. This is the default controller in sandbox.
DEFINE controllers::remote  -- Can't move/change items but can build ghosts/change settings.
DEFINE controllers::spectator  -- Can't change anything in the world but can view anything.

DEFINE rocket_silo_status  -- The various parts of the launch sequence of the rocket silo.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::arms_advance  -- The next state is `rocket_ready` or if the rocket is destroyed in this state then the next state will be `lights_blin...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::arms_retract  -- The next state is `rocket_flying` or if the rocket is destroyed in this state then the next state will be `lights_bli...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::building_rocket  -- The rocket silo is crafting rocket parts. When there are enough rocket parts, the silo will switch into the `create_r...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::create_rocket  -- The next state is `lights_blinking_open`. The rocket silo rocket entity gets created.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::doors_closing  -- The next state is `building_rocket`.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::doors_opened  -- The next state is `rocket_rising` or if the rocket is destroyed in this state then the next state will be `lights_bli...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::doors_opening  -- The next state is `doors_opened`. The rocket is getting prepared for launch.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::engine_starting  -- The next state is `arms_retract` or if the rocket is destroyed in this state then the next state will be `lights_blin...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::launch_started  -- The next state is `engine_starting` or if the rocket is destroyed in this state then the next state will be `lights_b...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::launch_starting  -- The next state is `launch_started`.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::lights_blinking_close  -- The next state is `doors_closing`.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::lights_blinking_open  -- The next state is `doors_opening`. The rocket is getting prepared for launch.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::rocket_flying  -- The next state is `lights_blinking_close`. The rocket is getting launched.
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::rocket_ready  -- The rocket launch can be started by the player. When the launch is started, the silo switches into the `launch_starti...
DEFINE rocket_silo_status::rocket_rising  -- The next state is `arms_advance` or if the rocket is destroyed in this state then the next state will be `lights_blin...
DEFINE segmented_unit_activity_mode

DEFINE segmented_unit_activity_mode::full  -- The segmented unit is fully active and simulated as if it is being observed by a player.
DEFINE segmented_unit_activity_mode::minimal  -- The segmented unit is minimally active, reducing unnecessary entity movement and trigger effects while continuing to ...
DEFINE segmented_unit_ai_state 
DEFINE segmented_unit_ai_state::attacking  -- The segmented unit is attacking an entity that is trespassing on its territory, but the segmented unit is not using i...
DEFINE segmented_unit_ai_state::enraged_at_nothing  -- The segmented unit is angry because it was attacked but it does not have a valid attack target, so it is wandering ar...
DEFINE segmented_unit_ai_state::enraged_at_target  -- The segmented unit is angry because it was attacked and is aggressively attacking an entity with its full strength.
DEFINE segmented_unit_ai_state::investigating  -- The segmented unit is investigating a location where it detected a disturbance.
DEFINE segmented_unit_ai_state::patrolling  -- The segmented unit is navigating its territory's patrol path. If the unit is not assigned to a territory, then it is ...

DEFINE train_state 
DEFINE train_state::arrive_signal  -- Braking before a rail signal.
DEFINE train_state::arrive_station  -- Braking before a station.
DEFINE train_state::destination_full  -- Same as no_path but all candidate train stops are full
DEFINE train_state::manual_control  -- Can move if user explicitly sits in and rides the train.
DEFINE train_state::manual_control_stop  -- Switched to manual control and has to stop.
DEFINE train_state::no_path  -- Has no path and is stopped.
DEFINE train_state::no_schedule  -- Doesn't have anywhere to go.
DEFINE train_state::on_the_path  -- Normal state -- following the path.
DEFINE train_state::wait_signal  -- Waiting at a signal.
DEFINE train_state::wait_station  -- Waiting at a station.
